page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool that uses state-of-the-art nearest neighbour DNA binding thermodynamics to estimate possible unwanted pairings between PCR samples and calculates automatically optimal multiplexing (grouping) solution.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool that uses state-of-the-art nearest neighbour DNA binding thermodynamics to estimate possible unwanted pairings between PCR samples and calculates automatically optimal multiplexing (grouping) solution.
